titles.title: A Shelter in the Time of Storm (3)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Lord's our Rock, in Him we hide, A shelter in the time of storm; Secure whatever ill be tide, A shelter in the time of storm.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Jesus the Rock in a weary land, A weary land, A weary land; Oh Jesus the Rock in a weary land - A shelter in the time of storm.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A shade by day, defense by night, A shelter in the time of storm; No fears alarm, no foes afright, A shelter in the time of storm.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The raging storms may round us beat, A shelter in the time of storm; We'll never leave our safe retreat, A shelter in the time of storm.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Rock divine, Oh Refuge dear, A shelter in the time of storm; Be Thou our Helper ever near, A shelter in the time of storm.
